meaning: adj.无关系的,外来的,[化]外部裂化,[化]新异反射
examples: We shall ignore factors extraneous to the problem.
We do not want any extraneous information on the page.
To avoid delays, she wanted the disaster relief legislation to be kept free of extraneous matters.
Even after tossing out all extraneous data, Bird's computers will be storing 15 petabytes a year.
The dedicated bayonet lens hood (LH3-01) can be attached to block out extraneous light.
